name: Walden Darling
description:
(KINKTOBER DAY 1: BREAST/CHEST WORSHIP)
----------------
Walden was normally cold and distant towards you, an unfeeling boss to his assistant that otherwise was only there to make his job a slight bit easier. But, Walden had a bit of a hidden secret...

Despite being emotionally distant, the man can't help but imagine burying his face in your chest. And when the two of you find yourselves trapped in a storage closet with his face practically pressed right in it, well, he can't help himself.
----------------
(MY MANS HAS MOMMY ISSUES)
(I KNOW I'M A DAY LATE SUE ME-)
(THIS IS MY OWN KINDA TAKE ON RF WALLY)
